questionText: Provide the intensity figures for Scope 1 emissions (metric tons CO2e) per unit of hydrocarbon category.
questionKo: 탄화수소 카테고리 단위당 범위 1 배출량(미터톤 CO2e)에 대한 원단위 수치를 제공하세요
simpleHelp: Intensity measures describe an organization's CO2e emissions in the context of another business metric. In this way, the emissions are normalized to account for growth. Data users and investors often track environmental performance with intensity ratios.

options: Thousand barrels of crude oil/ condensate
Thousand barrels of natural gas liquids
Thousand barrels of oil sands (includes bitumen and synthetic crude)
Million cubic feet of natural gas
Thousand barrels of refinery net production
Thousand metric tons of "high value chemicals" (lower olefins)

columns.text: Metric tons CO2e from hydrocarbon category per unit specified
columns.textKo: 미터톤 CO2e 에서 탄화수소 카테고리 마다 단위

options: Venting reduction, leak detection and gas capture
Other emissions reduction activities, please specify
optionsKo: 기타 배출량 활동, 직접 입력 명시

guidance.textKo: 전년 대비 변경사항은 2026 CDP 원문 및 변경 추적표 기준으로 확인하십시오.

guidance.text:
General
If you select "Other, please specify," provide a label for the Unit of hydrocarbon.
Include information on scope 1 only. Do not include scope 2.
Organizations operating in the midstream should still give information here based on their chosen metric or use "Other emission reduction metrics".
For example, an organization could choose "Thousand barrels of crude oil/ condensate" and specify in "Please explain" this refers to thousands of barrels transported.
Unit of hydrocarbon category (denominator) (column 1)
High value chemicals (HVCs) include lower olefins such as ethylene, propylene from the pyrolysis gas of steam crackers, benzene (contained amounts, excluding extracted amounts,) butadiene (also contained,) acetylene and hydrogen sold (as fuel).
Metric tons CO2e from hydrocarbon category per unit specified (column 2)
Scope 1 emissions per unit of hydrocarbon category reported here should be entered in metric tons CO2e per unit specified in column 1.
% change from previous year (column 3)
If you have experienced no change, please enter 0 (zero) in this column.
If the previous year's figure has been reported but recalculated since, please use the recalculated figure for the calculation of percentage change and note this in the comment column (column 6). The previous year is the 12-month period directly prior to the reporting period, even if it does not completely overlap with the period previously reported to CDP.
Direction of change (column 4)
A declining intensity ratio reflects a positive emissions performance, while an increasing intensity ratio reflects a negative emissions performance.
If the percentage change from last year is 0 (zero) select "No change".
Reason for change (column 5)
Select all applicable reasons behind the change in emissions intensity in the reporting year.
Please explain (column 6)
Explain the primary reasons behind the change and the degree to which different factors have influenced the figures.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text: High value chemicals: High value chemicals (HVCs) produced via steam cracking include ethylene, propylene from the pyrolysis gas of steam crackers, benzene (contained amounts, excluding extracted amounts), butadiene (also contained), acetylene, and hydrogen sold (as fuel).
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항에서 사용하는 주요 용어의 의미를 설명합니다. 용어 해석은 CDP 2026 원문과 국문 양식의 용어 사용을 우선 적용하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 5/5 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점 부여됨 마다 완료 행 비례 숫자 입력 의 행 공시된. 부분적으로 완료된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 최대 5/5점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
‘Increased' OR ‘Decreased' selected in column ‘Direction of change' AND any option excluding ‘Unidentified' selected in column ‘Reason for change' AND
Table completed - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
‘No change' selected in column ‘Direction of change' AND Table completed - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
All of the following met - 1 point
'Decreased' selected in column 'Direction of change' AND
Any of the following selected in column ‘Reason for change':
- 'Using lower emission fuels'
- 'Venting reduction, leak detection and gas capture'
- 'Flaring reduction'
- 'Energy conservation, recovery and efficiency'
- 'Equipment improvements'
- 'Carbon capture utilization and storage (CCUS)'
- 'Other emissions reduction activities, please specify'
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
One row scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

change.question_ko: 탄화수소 카테고리 단위당 범위 1 배출량(미터톤 CO2e)에 대한 원단위 수치를 제공하세요
change.q2025_text: Provide the intensity figures for Scope 1 emissions (metric tons CO2e) per unit of hydrocarbon category.
change.detail_change_types: New guidance, Change column type, Modified column header, New guidance
change.change_summary:
Added guidance to clarify that only scope 1 should be included and not to include scope 2 and to clarify how organizations operating in the modstream should report.
Column 'Reason for change' now has a list of dropdown options.
Column header updated from 'Comment' to 'Please explain' and added guidance specifying what to report.
change.scoring_change_summary:
CC Oil and Gas Awareness • ROUTE A added with checks on column ‘Direction of change' and column ‘Reason for change'. • ROUTE B added for organizations who indicate ‘No change'. Column ‘Reason for change' changed from open text to drop down options. Scoring has been updated to account for this change in structure.
CC Oil and Gas Management • Scoring added based on the selections in column ‘Reason for change'. Column ‘Reason for change' changed from open text to drop down options. Scoring has been updated to account for this change in structure.
change.reflected:
2026 question text applied
2026 response type/columns applied
2026 D/A/M/L point allocation linked
2026 scoring criteria linked
2025-to-2026 change summary linked

change.q2025_textKo: 탄화수소 카테고리 단위당 범위 1 배출량(미터톤 CO2e)에 대한 원단위 수치를 제공하세요

sourceInfo.name: CDP Full Corporate Questionnaire and Reporting Guidance 2026
sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '탄화수소 카테고리 단위당 범위 1 배출량(미터톤 CO2e)에 대한 원단위 수치를 제공하세요'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: 2025 CDP 국문 양식 및 2026 CDP 원문 기준 국문 보정
